overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a medieval great hall resembling Hogwarts, with floating candles illuminating long dining tables filled with people. A character in white robes walks down the central aisle while the camera maintains a static elevated view from a balcony, capturing the warm candlelight against the dark night visible through tall stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

events.description: character in white robes begins walking down the central aisle from the foreground toward the back of the hall
character passes the midpoint of the hall, approaching the raised platform at the far end

agents.ego_description: character in white robes walking steadily down the central aisle between long dining tables filled with seated people

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
elaborate chandeliers hanging from the high vaulted ceiling alongside the floating candles
tall gothic arched windows with blue stained glass showing the night sky outside
long wooden house tables arranged in rows, covered with plates and food, occupied by seated figures
tall stone walls with architectural details and mounted tapestries
large stone fireplace with burning fire on the right side of the hall
decorative banners and tapestries hanging on the stone walls between the windows

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous elevated view of a grand medieval dining hall illuminated by floating candles and chandeliers. The ego character in white robes walks steadily down the central aisle between rows of long dining tables where numerous people are seated. The stone architecture features tall stained glass windows revealing the dark night outside, while a large fireplace burns on the right wall. The camera remains static throughout, capturing the warm candlelit atmosphere and the character's progression toward the far end of the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a grand medieval dining hall as a figure in white robes traverses its length. It begins with a wide view of the stone architecture, where floating candles and chandeliers cast a warm glow over rows of long dining tables filled with people. As the character walks steadily down the central aisle, the camera captures the contrast between the flickering interior light and the dark night visible through tall stained glass windows. The scene then draws focus toward the right wall where a large fireplace burns, providing a secondary source of warmth and light. Finally, the movement concludes as the character progresses further toward the far end of the hall under the constant gaze of the balcony view.
